MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-22-2007 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: SAUL M. FERSTER, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF ACTON DOLORES.
LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY LORI SICARD FOR DEFENDANT HAROLD VONMULLER II.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED AND PLACED ON THE RECORD. THE PARTIES STIPULATE DEFENDANT WILL VACATE THE PREMISES AT 1530 DOLORES ST., #5, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110 BY 6 PM ON 4-23-07 AND SURRENDER KEYS AND GARAGE DOOR OPENERS TO PLAINTIFF. JUDGMENT WILL ENTER IMMEDIATELY. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH THE STIPULATION, THE JUDGMENT WILL BE VACATED AND A DISMISSAL WILL BE FILED. EACH PARTY TO PAY THEIR OWN ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE DEFENDANT WITH $3,000 DEPOSIT BY 5 PM ON 4-24-07.

Judge Pro Tem: Stanley Bair, Clerk: Nancy Regas, Court Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
SAUL M. FERSTER, 863-2678, APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF AND RESPONDING PARTY

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT HAROLD LAWRENCE VON MULLER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled WITH 5 days to answer. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Lisa Schwam, CSR #8994
